results.title: Correct guidance needed to prevent Sri Lanka becoming “Climate Orphans” – CEJ
results.description: The Centre for Environmental Justice (CEJ) has called for urgent action to strengthen climate resilience and environmental management in Sri Lanka, warning that the country risks becoming “climate orphans” if proper guidance and adaptation measures are not implemented.

results.description: Ranluspec is the only interchangeable ranibizumab biosimilar approved in the United States in both vial and pre-filled syringe (PFS) presentations

results.title: Man accused of causing crash charged with 4th DUI

results.title: Mobix Labs to Acquire U.S.-Built Drone Manufacturer Vision Aerial, Expanding Into Global Drone and Aerial Intelligence Markets
results.description: Mobix Labs, Inc. (Nasdaq: MOBX) today announced that it has signed a binding Letter of Intent to acquire Vision Aerial, Inc., a Montana-based manufacturer of American-built drones trusted in national security, government, energy, public safety, and critical infrastructure operations. The acquisition expands Mobix Labs into a fast-growing global market and marks the latest step in its previously [...]

results.title: Sand’s first Iowa general election ad criticizes Lahn’s dual residency
results.description: The first ad of the general election in Iowa’s gubernatorial campaign, from Democrat Rob Sand, criticizes Republican candidate Zach Lahn for keeping his family’s home in Kansas while campaigning in Iowa.

results.title: Veterans with PTSD found some relief in `quietest place on Earth’
results.description: Military veterans reported fewer flashbacks and nightmares related to PTSD after spending a 60-minute session in a Minneapolis research lab dubbed “the quietest place on Earth.” The results, reported this week by researchers at the Minneapolis Veterans Medical Center, suggest...

results.title: Davenport defends against 'frivolous' open meeting lawsuits; requests sanctions
results.description: Davenport council members issued a response to two open meetings lawsuits this week defending the city's presentations and calling the lawsuits "frivolous and meant to intimidate and harass the Council."
